intro:
I couldn't find any information on the plant "Plantaginorchis longicornu". However, I found information on a different plant that shares a similar name, "Plantago longicornu". If you are referring to this plant, here's a paragraph about it:

Plantago longicornu is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae, commonly known as a type of plantain. The health benefits of Plantago longicornu include its use in traditional medicine to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and mucilages, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Plantago longicornu include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe respiratory issues and promote cough relief.
